field.title: CRM ID ссылка
field.formula:
IF [account_id] = 53859 THEN
    URL("https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))
ELSEIF [account_id] = 57817 THEN
    URL("https://bneginskogoeng.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))
ELSEIF [account_id] = 55639 THEN
    URL("https://bneginskogomsk.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))
ELSE
    URL("https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id]), STR([crm_id]))
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [account_id_120x] = 53859 THEN
    URL("https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id_zezr]), STR([crm_id_zezr]))
ELSEIF [account_id_120x] = 57817 THEN
    URL("https://bneginskogoeng.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id_zezr]), STR([crm_id_zezr]))
ELSEIF [account_id_120x] = 55639 THEN
    URL("https://bneginskogomsk.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id_zezr]), STR([crm_id_zezr]))
ELSE
    URL("https://bneginskogo.amocrm.ru/leads/detail/" + STR([crm_id_zezr]), STR([crm_id_zezr]))
END
